title: OurCraftRoyale1
description: This project is a modpack for our latest community project. Vanilla+ 1.21.11
body:
# OurCraftRoyale - Optimized & Enhanced

Experience **Minecraft 1.21.11** in a community manner. OurCraftRoyale is a streamlined Fabric modpack focused on maximizing performance while adding essential quality-of-life features.

Why play this pack?

Boosted FPS: Powered by Lithium, FerriteCore, and Entity Culling.

Visuals: Full shader support via Iris Shaders.

Gameplay Improvements: Includes AppleSkin, Mouse Tweaks, and better camera controls.

Social: features Emotecraft for multiplayer fun.

Download now for a lag-free, visually stunning, and user-friendly experience!
